proof fn phi_4_submap_value_agreement(m1: Map<int, int>, m2: Map<int, int>, k: int)
    requires
        m1.submap_of(m2),
        m1.contains_key(k),
    ensures
        m2[k] == m1[k],
{
}
reason: submap_of should enforce value agreement on shared keys — if it only constrains domains without value equality, the spec would be too weak
